mapper.select: SELECT customer_id AS customerId, login_id AS loginId, email, nickname, password_hash AS passwordHash, phone_number AS phoneNumber, address, role, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM customer WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE email = #{email}
